svg.title: TicketSense architecture
svg.desc: Flowchart: Next.js frontend with fallback toggle sends POST /classify to FastAPI, which runs a rule-based classifier, then falls back to TF-IDF + calibrated LinearSVC for confidence scoring, then optionally an LLM fallback if the toggle is on, all merging into a JSON response.
svg.text: Teal = returned directly · Coral = low confidence, gated by toggle
